name: workspace-dev
description: Autonomous local workspace runtime for REST + deterministic Figma-to-code generation

scripts.build: tsup --config tsup.config.ts && node scripts/create-cjs-types.mjs && pnpm run ui:build && pnpm run plugin:build
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit && pnpm run ui:typecheck && pnpm run plugin:typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm run test:smoke:compile && pnpm run ui:build && pnpm run plugin:build && tsx --test "src/**/*.test.ts" "integration/**/*.test.ts" "plugin/**/*.test.ts" && pnpm run test:scripts && pnpm run ui:test
scripts.test:scripts: node --test "scripts/*.test.mjs" && pnpm run lint:job-engine-catch-logging && pnpm run lint:schema-names && pnpm run lint:playwright-webserver
scripts.test:ti-eval: tsx --test src/test-intelligence/validation-fixtures.test.ts src/test-intelligence/evidence-manifest.test.ts src/test-intelligence/evidence-attestation.test.ts scripts.test:ti-tenant-isolation-proof: tsx --test src/test-intelligence/tenant-isolation-proof.test.ts && node --import tsx scripts/check-tenant-isolation-proof.mjs --quiet && node --import tsx scripts/check-tenant-isolation-pentest.mjs --quiet
scripts.test:ti-live-e2e: WORKSPACE_TEST_SPACE_LIVE_E2E=1 node scripts/check-live-smoke-env.mjs && WORKSPACE_TEST_SPACE_LIVE_SMOKE=1 tsx --test src/test-intelligence/live-role-contract.live.test.ts && WORKSPACE_TEST_SPACE_LIVE_E2E=1 tsx --test src/test-intelligence/production-runner.live-e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:coverage: node --max-old-space-size=8192 ./node_modules/c8/bin/c8.js --merge-async --all --src src --include "src/**/*.ts" --exclude "src/**/*.test.ts" --exclude "src/isolated-server-entry.ts" --exclude "src/job-engine/types.ts" --exclude "src/parity/types.ts" --exclude "src/parity/types-core.ts" --exclude "src/parity/types-edit-session.ts" --exclude "src/parity/types-job.ts" --exclude "src/parity/types-kpi.ts" --exclude "src/parity/types-mapping.ts" --exclude "src/parity/types-sync.ts" --exclude "src/parity/fixtures/golden/**/expected/src_theme_theme.ts" --reporter=text-summary --reporter=lcov --reporter=json-summary --report-dir coverage tsx --test "src/**/*.test.ts" "integration/**/*.test.ts" && node scripts/check-coverage-thresholds.mjs
scripts.benchmark:visual:report: pnpm run benchmark:visual -- --ci --browsers chromium --storybook-component-catalog integration/fixtures/customer-board-golden/derived/storybook.component-visual-catalog.json --storybook-static-dir storybook-static/storybook-static && pnpm run benchmark:visual:protocol
scripts.ui:test:coverage: pnpm exec vitest run --config ui-src/vite.config.ts --coverage && UI_HOTSPOT_COVERAGE=1 pnpm exec vitest run --config ui-src/vite.config.ts --coverage
scripts.ui:test:visual-live: pnpm exec playwright test --config ui-src/playwright.config.ts --project=chromium ui-src/e2e/visual-parity.live.spec.ts
scripts.lint:boundaries: pnpm run lint:workspace-boundaries && pnpm run lint:agent-boundaries
scripts.lint:publint: sh -c 'set -e; for profile in default rocket default-rocket; do tarball=$(node scripts/build-profile.mjs --profile "$profile" --print-tarball); pnpm exec publint run "$tarball"; done'
scripts.lint:types-publish: sh -c 'set -e; for profile in default rocket default-rocket; do tarball=$(node scripts/build-profile.mjs --profile "$profile" --print-tarball); pnpm exec attw "$tarball" --config-path .attw.json; done'
scripts.docs:check: pnpm run docs:api:check && pnpm exec tsx --test src/docs-alignment.test.ts
scripts.storybook:evidence:extract: pnpm exec tsx src/storybook/generate-artifact.ts storybook-static/storybook-static reference/storybook
scripts.storybook:public-extracts: pnpm exec tsx src/storybook/generate-artifact.ts storybook-static/storybook-static reference/storybook
scripts.sbom:cyclonedx:template: pnpm run sbom:cyclonedx:template:mui && pnpm run sbom:cyclonedx:template:tailwind
scripts.sbom:spdx:template: pnpm run sbom:spdx:template:mui && pnpm run sbom:spdx:template:tailwind
scripts.release:quality-gates: pnpm run verify:workflow-install-scripts && pnpm run verify:workflow-persist-credentials && pnpm run verify:built-deps-allowlist && pnpm run verify:npmrc-freshness && pnpm run verify:lockfile-hosts && pnpm run template:install && pnpm run template:tailwind:install && pnpm run template:tailwind:dependency-denylist && pnpm run verify:audit && pnpm run template:audit && pnpm run template:signatures && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test:dast-smoke && pnpm run test:load && pnpm run test && pnpm run template:test && pnpm run template:tailwind:lint && pnpm run template:tailwind:typecheck && pnpm run template:tailwind:test && pnpm run template:tailwind:build && pnpm run template:tailwind:validate:ui && pnpm run template:tailwind:validate:playwright && pnpm run perf:web:tailwind:baseline:gate && pnpm run perf:web:tailwind:assert && pnpm run test:golden && pnpm run test:ti-eval && pnpm run test:ti-multi-source-eval && pnpm run test:ti-faithfulness && pnpm run test:ti-hallucination && pnpm run test:ti-a11y && pnpm run test:ti-judge-calibration && pnpm run test:ti-regression && pnpm run test:ti-finops-slo && pnpm run ui:test:coverage && pnpm run test:coverage && pnpm run ui:test:e2e && pnpm run test:flaky-retry && pnpm run test:bdd && pnpm run test:property-based && pnpm run ui:lint && pnpm run lint:boundaries && pnpm run lint:schema-names && pnpm run lint:playwright-webserver && pnpm run lint:ts-style && pnpm run lint:no-telemetry && pnpm run lint:secrets:all && pnpm run build && pnpm run lint:secrets:profiles && pnpm run lint:publint && pnpm run lint:types-publish && pnpm run lint:size && pnpm run verify:licenses && pnpm run verify:pack && pnpm run verify:docs-template-stack && pnpm run docs:api:check && pnpm run verify:reproducible-build && pnpm run verify:fips && pnpm run sbom:cyclonedx && pnpm run sbom:cyclonedx:template && pnpm run sbom:spdx && pnpm run sbom:spdx:template && pnpm run verify:sbom:parity && pnpm run verify:airgap && pnpm run verify:profile-gates && pnpm run verify:release-quality-gates && pnpm run release:readiness

verify:npmrc-freshness && pnpm run verify:lockfile-hosts && pnpm run template:install && pnpm run template:tailwind:install && pnpm run template:tailwind:dependency-denylist && pnpm run verify:audit
